subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of Grace which hath dawned forth from the horizon of thy Lord's Will, the Most Merciful, and We have sent it unto thee that thou mayest be illumined thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الفضل قد اشرق من افق مشیه ربک الرحمن و ارسلناه الیک لیستضی ء منه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
